commits.message: fix: add avoidEval to Vapi SDK to resolve CSP unsafe-eval block
commits.author: shalombook

commits.message: fix: commit updated card images and eval report
commits.author: shalombook

commits.message: docs: add comprehensive market research - ICP, pain points, competitor analysis
commits.author: shalombook

commits.message: feat: fix opener location/ethnicity variables and upgrade phase images
commits.author: shalombook

commits.message: fix: resolve 17 security audit findings and fix CI
commits.author: shalombook

panels.title: CSP unsafe-eval block
panels.scene: A wizard with a glowing JavaScript wand casts a spell, creating a shimmering barrier labeled 'CSP'. A ghostly hand labeled 'eval()' reaches through the barrier. The Knight calmly adds 'avoidEval' to a scroll. The ghostly hand vanishes.

bubbles.speaker: Villager
bubbles.text: The dark magic of eval() is banished! Our websites are safe!

bubbles.speaker: Knight
bubbles.text: It disables the eval() function. It's generally bad practice.

panels.title: Resolve 17 security audit findings
panels.scene: Seventeen tiny gremlins are trying to break into a fortress made of code. Each gremlin has a tiny pickaxe labeled 'XSS', 'CSRF', etc. The Knight calmly seals the cracks with a magical putty gun.

bubbles.speaker: Villager
bubbles.text: Our digital kingdom is impenetrable! The hackers are foiled!

bubbles.speaker: Knight
bubbles.text: Just closing some security loopholes. Standard procedure.

panels.title: Fix opener location/ethnicity variables
panels.scene: A royal scribe is frantically rewriting a census scroll. Villagers look on in confusion. The Knight points to a few incorrect entries.

bubbles.speaker: Villager
bubbles.text: Our identities are saved! No longer shall we be misclassified!

bubbles.speaker: Knight
bubbles.text: Just correcting some variable assignments. Wrong data types.

panels.title: 5 commits. 3 fixes. 1 feature. 1 documentation.
panels.scene: The Knight sits wearily on a stone bench, polishing his sword. Villagers are constructing a giant stone tablet with the words 'Market Research' inscribed on it. A small child is named 'AvoidEval'.

bubbles.speaker: Villager
bubbles.text: Let us celebrate the clarity of his documentation!
